Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jun-27-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on June 27, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Butler appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court noted that no one else is present, stated that there is an issue with the form of the proof of service showing service to Maria and Remedios without an address and that service for Valerio was sent to Anabel. Mr. Butler stated that they filed a notice and proof of service by File and Serve on November 21st, that they completed the boxes, that he does have addresses in the proof of service and that he does not know why File and Serve filed the incorrect one. Mr. Butler also stated that it is the address that was confirmed by his Client, that Valerio might be living in the Philippines, that there are no assets and that there is a law suit that is set for trial on February 5, 2018. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is taken under submission as of December 12, 2017 subject to filing a supplement that can attach the corrected proof of service and answer questions about Valerio (where he lives). If he is in the Philippines, the matter may have to be restored back on calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Continued To Jun-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Butler appeared by telephone for Edita King.

Mr. Butler stated that the Estate is not in a position to close and that the purpose of this was to establish authority to stand in to conduct litigation to determine if there were any existing assets. Mr. Butler also stated that a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration was submitted and pending, and that he did not appear at the last hearing because it was not on his calendar. Status on close of the Estate is continued to June 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that the petition will be filed before then. The Order to Appear is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-02-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Continued To May-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not filed a petition to close the Estate or a petition for approval of report of status of administration. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Continued To May-10-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Butler (via court call) for Edita King.

The Court stated that it is looking for an inventory & appraisal. Mr. Butler stated that he needs a one week continuance and that they will try and get it filed today. The status on filing an inventory & appraisal was continued to May 10, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and counsel is to make sure to get the document filed promptly.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Continued To Apr-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Butler (via court call) for (petitioner) Edita King.

The Court stated that it just received the information and that the declaration should be verified. Mr. Butler stated that it was signed under penalty of perjury. The Court stated that is also concerned regarding notice to the relatives in the Philippines. Mr. Butler stated that the petitioner does not know the actual location of the relatives in the Philippines, that best efforts are being made to notice them, that the only assets that may exist are in a safe deposit box, that there is no real property or other assets, that they are seeking letters of administration to be able to open the safe deposit box and that if anything is in the box they will contact as necessary. The petition for letters of administration was continued to October 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
